violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — ---Observed cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed doors and sides of appliances need to be wiped down.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Observed cracks on floor in food prep area.

Handwashing lavatories. — ---Handwashing lavatory was not accessible to allow convenient use by employees.--Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Observed employee using hand sink as a food prep station.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed cracked floor in food prep area.
